title: No One Knows How Many Deadly Air Bags Are on U.S. Roads
title_cn: 没人知道美国道路上有多少致命气囊

paragraphs.cn: 2026年1月31日 美国东部时间上午5:30

paragraphs.en: After nine confirmed deaths in car accidents in which cheap, Chinese-made air-bag parts blew apart—including two in the past two months—federal regulators issued an unusual and stern safety warning Friday, telling all used-car owners in the U.S. to try to get to the bottom of their vehicles’ maintenance histories.
paragraphs.cn: 迪拜——在九起已确认的汽车事故中，廉价的中国制造气囊部件爆裂导致死亡——其中两起发生在过去两个月——联邦监管机构周五发布了一项不同寻常且严厉的安全警告，告知美国所有二手车车主，应努力查明其车辆的维修历史。

paragraphs.en: The unsettling reality: It isn’t easy to know where a used car’s air bag came from.
paragraphs.cn: 令人不安的现实是：很难知道一辆二手车的安全气囊来自何处。

paragraphs.en: For months, federal auto-safety regulators and investigators have been trying to assess the potential danger of substandard air-bag parts from an obscure supplier in China to understand how their products made their way into the U.S. They don’t yet know precisely how many of the air bags from the company, DTN Airbag, are in cars and trucks in America.
paragraphs.cn: 几个月来，联邦汽车安全监管机构和调查人员一直在努力评估来自中国一家鲜为人知的供应商的劣质气囊部件的潜在危险，以了解其产品是如何进入美国的。他们尚不清楚这家名为DTN Airbag的公司生产的气囊究竟有多少在美国的汽车和卡车中。

paragraphs.en: “Anyone who buys a used vehicle that’s been in a crash so severe that the air bags deployed is really rolling the dice,” said Adam Raviv, former chief counsel at the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration, the U.S. auto-safety regulator.
paragraphs.cn: “任何购买曾发生严重碰撞导致气囊弹出的二手车的人，都像是在赌博，”美国汽车安全监管机构国家公路交通安全管理局（NHTSA）前首席法律顾问亚当·拉维夫说。

paragraphs.en: On Friday, NHTSA took the extraordinary step of launching a dedicated resource page about DTN’s air-bag parts, even though the agency estimates that as few as 10,000 might be on American roads. The Chinese company makes air-bag inflaters, which contain hazardous chemicals that ignite during a crash to fill an air bag with gas rapidly.
paragraphs.cn: 周五，NHTSA采取了非同寻常的举措，推出了一个关于DTN气囊部件的专用资源页面，尽管该机构估计美国道路上可能只有1万个此类部件。这家中国公司生产气囊充气器，其中含有危险化学品，在碰撞时会点燃，迅速将气囊充满气体。

paragraphs.en: One known crash in May 2023
paragraphs.cn: 2023年5月发生一起已知事故

paragraphs.en: Two fatalities in December 2025
paragraphs.cn: 2025年12月发生两起死亡事故

paragraphs.en: One known crash in May 2023
paragraphs.cn: 2023年5月发生一起已知事故

paragraphs.en: Two fatalities in December 2025
paragraphs.cn: 2025年12月发生两起死亡事故

paragraphs.en: Source: Transportation Department
paragraphs.cn: 来源：交通部

paragraphs.en: NHTSA said nine people have died and two were injured in otherwise-survivable crashes after DTN inflaters ruptured, sending large metal fragments into drivers’ chests, necks, eyes and faces. The two most-recent incidents happened in December, in Texas and Ohio.
paragraphs.cn: NHTSA表示，在DTN充气器破裂后，九人死亡，两人受伤，这些事故原本是可以幸存的，破裂的充气器将大块金属碎片射入驾驶员的胸部、颈部、眼睛和面部。最近的两起事件发生在12月，分别在得克萨斯州和俄亥俄州。

paragraphs.en: An American lawyer who previously said he represented DTN didn’t respond to a request for comment. The lawyer told The Wall Street Journal in October that DTN is committed to cooperating with NHTSA on its investigation.
paragraphs.cn: 一位此前表示代表DTN的美国律师没有回应置评请求。该律师在10月份告诉《华尔街日报》，DTN致力于配合NHTSA的调查。

paragraphs.en: DTN has said that its business is limited to inflaters and that it doesn’t produce air bags.
paragraphs.cn: DTN曾表示，其业务仅限于充气器，不生产气囊。

paragraphs.en: “Purchasers will have to purchase our inflaters and install them into air bags to make our product work,” the company said in a court filing that is part of a continuing lawsuit. “Different vehicles and different models of air bags require different types of inflaters, and it is the purchaser’s responsibility to conduct professional testing to ensure that the inflater could be safely used in the purchaser’s air bag.”
paragraphs.cn: “购买者必须购买我们的充气器并将其安装到气囊中，才能使我们的产品发挥作用，”该公司在一份正在进行的诉讼文件中表示。“不同的车辆和不同型号的气囊需要不同类型的充气器，购买者有责任进行专业测试，以确保充气器能够安全地用于购买者的气囊中。”

paragraphs.en: A statement on DTN’s website says the company doesn’t do business in the U.S. and that its products are prohibited from being sold to the U.S.
paragraphs.cn: DTN网站上的一份声明称，该公司不在美国开展业务，其产品被禁止销往美国。

paragraphs.en: NHTSA said it doesn’t believe any automakers use DTN inflaters in new cars or as authentic replacements for vehicles sold and serviced in the U.S. But DTN parts have made their way into the supply of air-bag replacements for cars that have been in accidents, the agency said.
paragraphs.cn: NHTSA表示，不认为有任何汽车制造商在新车中使用DTN充气器，或将其作为在美国销售和维修车辆的原厂替换件。但该机构表示，DTN部件已进入事故车辆的气囊替换件供应链。

paragraphs.en: Catch up on the headlines, understand the news and make better decisions, free in your inbox daily. Enjoy a free article in every edition.
paragraphs.cn: 每天免费在您的收件箱中获取头条新闻，了解新闻并做出更好的决策。每期都可享受一篇免费文章。

paragraphs.en: Safety regulators and investigators are alarmed by the mounting body count associated with what is believed to be a relatively small number of air bags with DTN parts, people familiar with the situation said.
paragraphs.cn: 知情人士称，安全监管机构和调查人员对与数量相对较少的含有DTN部件的气囊相关的死亡人数不断上升感到震惊。

paragraphs.en: The last major air-bag recall began after fewer fatalities. In 2015, NHTSA said automakers would recall nearly 34 million cars with deadly air bags from Takata, a company that was later sold after it filed for bankruptcy. At the time, Takata’s air bags were linked to six deaths worldwide.
paragraphs.cn: 上一次大规模气囊召回是在死亡人数较少之后开始的。2015年，NHTSA表示，汽车制造商将召回近3400万辆装有高田公司致命气囊的汽车，该公司后来在申请破产后被出售。当时，高田气囊与全球六起死亡事故有关。

paragraphs.en: Normally, when a defective and deadly auto part is discovered, a vehicle recall can be conducted to address the problem. With DTN, a recall might be difficult—if not impossible—because the company’s business is based overseas and the components are sold as aftermarket parts, Raviv said.
paragraphs.cn: 通常，当发现有缺陷且致命的汽车部件时，可以进行车辆召回以解决问题。拉维夫说，对于DTN，召回可能很困难——甚至不可能——因为该公司的业务设在海外，且部件作为售后市场零件出售。

paragraphs.en: NHTSA has previously been able to go after aftermarket parts companies and dealers before for selling cars with dangerous parts. But how DTN’s air-bag parts came to the U.S. is difficult to determine. NHTSA has said it believes the parts were likely imported illegally. Producers of counterfeit air bags in the U.S. have purchased air-bag parts online and received them in the mail, before assembling them in America and selling them to mechanic shops for as little as $100.
paragraphs.cn: NHTSA此前曾追究售后市场公司和经销商销售带有危险部件的汽车的责任。但DTN气囊部件如何进入美国很难确定。NHTSA表示，它认为这些部件可能是非法进口的。美国的假冒气囊生产商通过在线购买气囊部件并通过邮件接收，然后在美国组装并以低至100美元的价格出售给汽修店。

paragraphs.en: Fake air bags can look identical to genuine components.
paragraphs.cn: 假冒气囊可能看起来与原厂部件一模一样。

paragraphs.en: NHTSA said it is working to identify which vehicles might be affected, who sold the DTN inflaters, and what options might be available for affected vehicle owners. A spokesman for NHTSA said that if the regulator finds that a safety defect in air-bag parts exists, it is a violation of federal law for anyone to sell them for installation in a motor vehicle.
paragraphs.cn: NHTSA表示，正在努力确定哪些车辆可能受到影响，谁销售了DTN充气器，以及受影响车主可能有哪些选择。NHTSA发言人表示，如果监管机构发现气囊部件存在安全缺陷，任何人销售这些部件用于安装在机动车中都违反了联邦法律。

paragraphs.en: Because no recall has been filed, drivers can’t find out whether their vehicles are at risk by searching for open campaigns through NHTSA associated with their vehicle identification numbers.
paragraphs.cn: 由于尚未提交召回，驾驶员无法通过NHTSA搜索与其车辆识别号相关的公开召回活动来查明其车辆是否存在风险。

paragraphs.en: NHTSA urged drivers who find that their vehicles previously experienced an air-bag deployment to have an inspection by a certified technician at a dealership or a reputable independent mechanic and verify whether the air bag is a legitimate part. Drivers shouldn’t inspect the vehicle themselves, the regulator added, because tampering with a steering wheel or an air bag could result in a deployment and cause death or serious injury.
paragraphs.cn: NHTSA敦促发现其车辆此前曾发生气囊弹出的驾驶员，由经销商或信誉良好的独立技师进行检查，并核实气囊是否为合法部件。监管机构补充说，驾驶员不应自行检查车辆，因为篡改方向盘或气囊可能导致气囊弹出并造成死亡或严重伤害。

paragraphs.en: “If a DTN inflater is found, the vehicle should not be driven until you are able to have it replaced with genuine parts,” NHTSA said.
paragraphs.cn: “如果发现DTN充气器，在您能够将其更换为原厂部件之前，不应驾驶该车辆，”NHTSA说。

paragraphs.en: Write to Ryan Felton at ryan.felton@wsj.com
paragraphs.cn: 请发送邮件至 Ryan Felton (ryan.felton@wsj.com)

vocabulary.example: NHTSA said nine people have died and two were injured in otherwise-survivable crashes after DTN inflaters ruptured, sending large metal fragments into drivers’ chests, necks, eyes and faces.
